assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 12: 'Affected version range | versions prior to the fix (IMPRECISE -- no precise threshold in Jira description)' and line 13: 'Fixed version | see advisory (IMPRECISE -- no precise version in Jira description)'. Line 43 further confirms: 'The Jira description provides only imprecise affected version information.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 6: 'Source: https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901'. Line 10: 'Affected range: versions less than 0.4.8 (lessThan: "0.4.8", versionType: semver)'. Line 11: 'Fix threshold: 0.4.8'. The MITRE CVE API was queried and lessThan 0.4.8 was extracted.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 15: 'Source: https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901'. Line 19: 'Introduced: 0 (all versions from the beginning)'. Line 20: 'Fixed: 0.4.8'. The OSV.dev API was queried and fixed version 0.4.8 was extracted from the ranges/events data.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 24-30: Cross-Validation Table shows MITRE (< 0.4.8, PRECISE) and OSV.dev (introduced 0 fixed 0.4.8, PRECISE) both agree. Line 34: 'MITRE and OSV.dev agree: the fix threshold is 0.4.8'. Lines 40-42: '0.4.8 (cross-validated, both external sources agree) This enriched fix threshold will be used in Step 2.3 for version impact comparisons instead of the imprecise Jira description data.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md line 5: 'Using enriched fix threshold from Step 1.5: h2 < 0.4.8 is affected (versions >= 0.4.8 are fixed).' All version comparisons use 0.4.8 as the threshold: line 15 '0.4.5 < 0.4.8' (YES), line 16 '0.4.8 >= 0.4.8 (fixed)' (NO). The enriched value from Step 1.5 is explicitly referenced, not the imprecise Jira data.
